args: const { normalizeBook } = require('./apps/catalog/model.cjs'); const b = normalizeBook({ title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' }); if (b.title !== 'Dune' || b.author !== 'Frank Herbert') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(b)); try { normalizeBook({ title: '', author: 'x' }); throw new Error('expected TypeError'); } catch (error) { if (!(error instanceof TypeError)) throw error; } console.log('catalog model ok');

workItems.title: Implement create-book API handler against OpenAPI contract

args: const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const { handleCreateBook } = require('./apps/catalog/api.cjs'); const created = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' } }); if (created.status !== 201 || created.body.book.title !== 'Dune' || created.body.book.author !== 'Frank Herbert') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(created)); const invalid = handleCreateBook({ method: 'POST', body: { title: '', author: 'x' } }); if (invalid.status !== 400 || !invalid.body.error) throw new Error(JSON.stringify(invalid)); const evidencePath = path.join(process.env.MAKEITREAL_BOARD_DIR, 'evidence', 'work.catalog-api.openapi-conformance.json'); fs.writeFileSync(evidencePath, JSON.stringify({ kind: 'openapi-conformance', ok: true, workItemId: process.env.MAKEITREAL_WORK_ITEM_ID, contractId: 'contract.catalog.create.openapi', cases: [{ contractId: 'contract.catalog.create.openapi', request: { method: 'POST', path: '/books', body: { title: ' Dune ', author: ' Frank Herbert ' } }, response: created }, { contractId: 'contract.catalog.create.openapi', request: { method: 'POST', path: '/books', body: { title: '', author: 'x' } }, response: invalid }] }, null, 2)); console.log('catalog api ok');

# Make It Real Work Item

Board: board.offhours-catalog-api
Work item: work.catalog-model
Title: Implement catalog book normalization module
Responsibility unit: ru.catalog-model

## Required Contract

Complete the work item described by the staged source artifacts.
- Read .makeitreal/source/prd.json, .makeitreal/source/design-pack.json, and .makeitreal/source/work-item.json before editing.
- Own only the declared responsibility boundary.
- Do not edit outside allowedPaths.
- Use only declared contractIds for cross-boundary behavior.
- Do not add fallback behavior for undeclared SDK/API states.
- Fail fast and report the root cause if the happy path cannot be implemented.
- Leave verification evidence to the Make It Real engine.

## allowedPaths
- apps/catalog/model.cjs

## contractIds
- contract.catalog.model

## dependencyArtifacts
- none

## Source Artifacts
- .makeitreal/source/prd.json
- .makeitreal/source/design-pack.json
- .makeitreal/source/work-item.json
- .makeitreal/handoff.json

Title: Implement create-book API handler against OpenAPI contract
Responsibility unit: ru.catalog-api

## Required Contract

Complete the work item described by the staged source artifacts.
- Read .makeitreal/source/prd.json, .makeitreal/source/design-pack.json, and .makeitreal/source/work-item.json before editing.
- Own only the declared responsibility boundary.
- Do not edit outside allowedPaths.
- Use only declared contractIds for cross-boundary behavior.
- Do not add fallback behavior for undeclared SDK/API states.
- Fail fast and report the root cause if the happy path cannot be implemented.
- Leave verification evidence to the Make It Real engine.

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":47617,"duration_api_ms":45815,"num_turns":12,"result":"파일이 정상적으로 작성되었습니다. 구현 요약:

- `apps/catalog/api.cjs`에 `handleCreateBook(request)` 핸들러 작성 (allowedPaths 내).
- `contract.catalog.model`을 통해 `./model.cjs`의 `normalizeBook`만 호출 (선언된 contractIds만 사용).
- 정상 경로: `normalizeBook(request.body)` 결과로 `{ status: 201, body: { book } }` 반환 (AC-003, OpenAPI 201 스키마 일치).
- 검증 실패: `normalizeBook`이 `TypeError`를 던질 때만 `{ status: 400, body: { error } }` 반환 (AC-004, OpenAPI 400 스키마 일치).
- 그 외 fallback 동작은 추가하지 않고 비-`TypeError`는 재-throw하여 fast-fail.
